role: Site-specific Carrd template instance for the Lunar auto film draft/copy, separated from the legacy universal main-template baseline.
updateRule: If the template folder path or builder URL changes, update this file first before changing procedural docs.
knowledgeRule: Store canonical deterministic builder knowledge in the local carrd-v2 repo. External exports are optional and must not be required to operate this workspace.
knowledgeDomainRule: Separate builder-static Carrd Builder knowledge from template-instance project knowledge in every scan, artifact, and export.

compareLiveTemplateAgainst: plugin inventory and configuration in the live template
